zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Seagrave於1295年9月5日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈普登 洛福時，她的父親John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave39歲，母親Maud de Swynnerton40歲。她於大約1334年與Sir Robert John Belknap結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1370年4月1日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Seagrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

variants.name: Seagraves
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of Seagrave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Seagrave was born on 5 September 1295, in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, was 39 and her mother, Maud de Swynnerton, was 40. She married Sir Robert John Belknap about 1334. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 April 1370, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Seagrave est née le 5 septembre 1295, à Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Maud de Swynnerton, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert John Belknap environ 1334. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1370, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

September 1295 in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave 39 und ihre Mutter Maud de Swynnerton 40. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Seagraveが1295年9月5日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンプデン ローで生まれた時，父John Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveは39歳，母Maud de Swynnertonは40歳であった。約1334年にSir Robert John Belknapと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1370年4月1日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Seagrave(이)가 1295년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 함p든 로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Swynnerton(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 Sir Robert John Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Seagrave родилась 5 сентября 1295 г. в местности хампден роу, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Swynnerton, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert John Belknap около 1334 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 апреля 1370 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
